All right, so what we're gonna do is we're gonna set up some basic bottom-of-funnel Retargeting for our clients. Okay, so this is one of the first things that you need to set up if your customer is already getting Traffic whether it's Google or organic or they run ads or the gut Instagram, you know linking to their page This is gonna ensure that you pick up any any sales right off the bat while you're launching their Validating the rapid-fire testing sequence So this is setting up the bottom of funnel if the client has zero traffic as in it's a brand new website It's just been launched Then you don't really need to do this step until you have launched your top-of-funnel stuff Okay, so what we're gonna do is click on create new campaign and then here we're gonna create on catalog sales There's really two ways to set up retargeting the first one is to run a catalog sales Campaign objective now this is using what we call dynamic product ads if you're not sure what that is go back in the Framework training around setting up product catalogs Essentially dynamic product ads are when you retarget people based on the specific product that they looked at on your website So think of it like what Amazon does to you you go on Amazon you check out a lot of products And then it retargets you with specifically what you looked at or what you added to your cart or Even what Facebook thinks you're gonna engage with if you only looked at say one product So that's catalog sales objective to set that up If your client only has one product one or you know one or two products on their website A catalog sale objective is a little over the top You don't really need that and what I would recommend in that instance is you actually run it as an engagement based objective Typically this campaign objective will feed out a lot better the budget So you'll get a lot more traction for your budget and it tends to do quite well. You can test it out as well So let's go catalog sales You're gonna have to select the catalog that you created now This is go through that training again But you're gonna need admin access to the catalog in order to select it from here.
